title: Zoom security advisory (AV26-707)
description: On July 14, 2026, Zoom published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Remote Control for Zoom Contact Center for Windows  versions prior to 7.0.0
Zoom Meeting SDK for Windows  versions prior to 6.6.11
Zoom Rooms for Windows  versions prior to 7.1.0
Zoom Workplace for Windows  versions prior to 7.0.5
Zoom Workplace VDI Client for Windows  versions prior to 7.0.10, 6.5.18 and 6.6.15
Zoom Workplace VDI Client for Windows  versions prior to 6.5.17 and 6.6.14
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
